codeReview.summary: Core feature behavior matches the contract: picker launches supported agents through a shared adapter in caller-path context, unavailable/cancel paths avoid process and state mutation, and successful launches persist last-agent state in tmux option plus atomic state.env writes. One non-blocking shell-quoting edge case remains in fallback menu command construction.

issues.description: Fallback display-menu run-shell entries interpolate pane_current_path/invoking_client_name inside a single-quoted command without escaping single quotes. Paths containing apostrophes can break command parsing and fail agent launch from menu fallback.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature adds a deterministic agent-picker regression test, but shared validator commands are not updated to run it by default.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit 71ed3b1 adds tmux/plugins/tmux-workspace-agent/tests/agent-picker.sh, while .factory/services.yaml only defines lint, test (socket smoke), and test_workspace_actions commands.

summary: PASS. Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit diff for feature agent-picker-launch-and-state-contract. Implementation satisfies expected behavior with no blocking defects; one non-blocking fallback menu quoting edge case and one services-state observation were recorded.
